about.bio: I am Dr. Nazir Ahmad Shekari, a urological surgeon specializing in endourology and andrology. Over the past five years, I have been working in the diagnosis and treatment of a wide range of urological diseases, and I always strive to choose the best scientific and minimally invasive methods for each patient.

home.intro: Urological surgeon with over 5 years of experience in diagnosing and treating diseases of the urinary tract and kidneys. Focusing on minimally invasive surgeries and modern medical standards.

contact.faq_q1: How do I book an appointment with Dr. Shekari?
contact.faq_a1: You can book appointments in three ways: 1) Call our appointment line at 079 604 0915, 2) Use the online form on this page, or 3) Visit our clinic at Jami Hospital during working hours. New patients should arrive 15 minutes early for registration.
contact.faq_q2: What should I bring to my first appointment?
contact.faq_a2: Please bring: 1) National ID or passport, 2) Previous medical records and test results, 3) Current medications list, 4) Insurance information if applicable, 5) Referral letter from your doctor (if any).
contact.faq_q3: How long does a typical consultation last?
contact.faq_a3: Initial consultations typically last 30-45 minutes to allow thorough evaluation. Follow-up visits are usually 15-20 minutes. Complex cases may require more time.
contact.faq_q4: Can I get a same-day emergency appointment?
contact.faq_a4: Yes, we reserve slots for emergencies daily. Call +93 79 604 0915 for immediate assistance. Urgent cases are prioritized.
contact.faq_a5: Seek immediate care for: 1) Severe kidney pain with fever, 2) Inability to urinate, 3) Heavy blood in urine with clots, 4) Testicular torsion symptoms (sudden severe pain), 5) Post-operative complications like excessive bleeding.
contact.faq_a6: Yes, our emergency urology service operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Call +93 79 604 0915 at any time for emergencies. An on-call urologist is always available.
contact.faq_q7: Do I need to call before coming for emergency?
contact.faq_a7: While not required, calling ahead helps us prepare for your arrival. For critical emergencies, come directly and our staff will assist immediately upon arrival.
contact.faq_q8: What emergency equipment do you have available?
contact.faq_a8: We have complete emergency facilities including: ultrasound machines, emergency surgery theater, dialysis equipment, blood bank access, and critical care monitoring systems.
contact.faq_q9: What urological conditions do you treat?
contact.faq_a9: We specialize in: kidney stones, prostate disorders, male infertility, urinary tract infections, bladder cancer, pediatric urology, erectile dysfunction, and minimally invasive surgeries including robotic and laser procedures.
contact.faq_a10: Yes, we have a state-of-the-art robotic surgery system. Dr. Rajesh Kumar (our Indian specialist) performs robotic prostatectomies, kidney surgeries, and reconstructive procedures with minimal invasiveness.
contact.faq_q11: What diagnostic tests are available at your clinic?
contact.faq_a11: We offer comprehensive diagnostics: ultrasound, CT scans, urodynamic testing, cystoscopy, PSA testing, semen analysis, 24-hour urine collection, and advanced blood work. Most results are available within 24 hours.
contact.faq_a12: Absolutely. We provide second opinion consultations where our international team reviews your case. Bring all medical records for comprehensive evaluation.
contact.faq_a13: Regular hours: Monday-Saturday 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM, Sunday 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM. Emergency services: 24/7. Administrative office: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM weekdays.
contact.faq_q14: What languages are spoken at your clinic?
contact.faq_a14: Our team is multilingual: Dari, Pashto, English, Hindi, and Urdu. International patients can request an English-speaking doctor or interpreter services.
contact.faq_q15: Is parking available at your facility?
contact.faq_a15: Yes, we have ample free parking for patients and visitors. Valet service is available for patients with mobility issues. The parking area is monitored 24/7 for security.
contact.faq_a16: We accept most major insurance providers. Please bring your insurance card. For international patients, we provide detailed invoices for insurance claims. Cash and credit cards are also accepted.

services_page.hero_subtitle: Comprehensive urology treatments tailored for you
services_page.kidney_what_desc: A brief overview of kidney and urinary tract stones, their causes and risk factors.
services_page.kidney_symptoms_desc: Common symptoms include severe pain, blood in urine, and frequent urination.
services_page.kidney_diagnosis_desc: Diagnosis usually involves imaging such as ultrasound or CT scan.
services_page.kidney_treatment_desc: Treatment ranges from medication to minimally invasive surgery depending on size and location.
services_page.kidney_when_desc: See a doctor if you experience intense pain or cannot urinate.
services_page.prostate_what_desc: Overview of prostate diseases including enlargement, cancer, and inflammation.
services_page.prostate_symptoms_desc: Symptoms may include urinary difficulties, pain, or blood in urine.
services_page.prostate_diagnosis_desc: Diagnosis often involves PSA tests, digital exams, and imaging.
services_page.prostate_treatment_desc: Treatments range from medication to surgery depending on condition.
services_page.prostate_when_desc: Consult a doctor if you have persistent urinary problems.
services_page.urinary_infections_what_desc: Urinary tract infections are bacterial infections affecting the bladder or urethra.
services_page.urinary_infections_symptoms_desc: Common signs include burning sensation, urgency, and cloudy urine.
services_page.urinary_infections_diagnosis_desc: Diagnosis is confirmed via urine tests and cultures.
services_page.urinary_infections_treatment_desc: Antibiotics are the mainstay of treatment.
services_page.urinary_infections_when_desc: Seek medical attention if symptoms are severe or recurrent.
services_page.male_infertility_what_desc: Male infertility involves factors that prevent a man from fertilizing an egg.
services_page.male_infertility_symptoms_desc: Often no obvious symptoms; may include hormonal issues or sexual dysfunction.
services_page.male_infertility_diagnosis_desc: Evaluation includes semen analysis and hormonal testing.
services_page.male_infertility_treatment_desc: Treatments can include medication, surgery, or assisted reproductive techniques.
services_page.male_infertility_when_desc: See a specialist if pregnancy does not occur after one year of trying.
services_page.sexual_disorders_what_desc: Sexual disorders cover conditions such as erectile dysfunction and premature ejaculation.
services_page.sexual_disorders_symptoms_desc: Symptoms vary but often involve inability to achieve or maintain an erection.
services_page.sexual_disorders_diagnosis_desc: Diagnosis may involve physical exam and psychological assessment.
services_page.sexual_disorders_treatment_desc: Options include medication, therapy, or lifestyle changes.
services_page.sexual_disorders_when_desc: Consult a physician if sexual performance issues persist.
services_page.endourology_surgeries_what_desc: Endourology surgeries are minimally invasive procedures inside the urinary tract.
services_page.endourology_surgeries_symptoms_desc: Typically performed to treat stones, strictures, or tumors.
services_page.endourology_surgeries_diagnosis_desc: Candidates diagnosed via imaging and clinical evaluation.
services_page.endourology_surgeries_treatment_desc: Includes procedures like ureteroscopy, PCNL, and laparoscopic techniques.
services_page.endourology_surgeries_when_desc: When less invasive treatments have failed or in complex cases.
services_page.service_book_cta_body: Get a clear, evidence-based plan from Dr. Nazir Ahmad Shekari.

faq_page.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_page.a_kidney_stone: A kidney stone is a hard deposit made of minerals and salts that form inside your kidneys.
faq_page.a_prostate_care: Follow your doctor’s instructions regarding wound care, activity levels, and medications.
faq_page.a_male_infertility: Male infertility refers to a man’s inability to cause pregnancy in a fertile female.

why_choose.title: Trusted urology care, built around you
why_choose.subtitle: Advanced clinical training, modern equipment, and a patient-first approach -recognized across Afghanistan and beyond.
why_choose.wc_b1: Hundreds of successful surgeries and consultations across urology and andrology, with consistently strong patient outcomes.
why_choose.wc_b2: Specialist training in endourology and andrology with continuous education in modern minimally-invasive techniques.
why_choose.wc_b3: Modern diagnostic and surgical equipment including laser stone treatment, ultrasound, and endourological tools.
why_choose.wc_b4: Strict patient privacy. Clear, evidence-based recommendations -no unnecessary procedures, ever.
why_choose.wc_b5: 24/7 emergency line and same-day appointment availability for urgent urological cases.
why_choose.wc_b6: Multilingual care in Dari, Pashto, and English. Clear explanations at every step of your treatment.

process.title: Simple, transparent care path
process.subtitle: From your first appointment to follow-up -a structured, patient-focused experience.
process.p1_body: Request an appointment online, by phone, or in person. We confirm within 2 business hours.
process.p2_body: Comprehensive evaluation, medical history review, and any required diagnostics -all in one visit.
process.p3_body: We discuss findings, explain options clearly, and design a treatment plan that fits your needs.
process.p4_body: Modern treatment in a safe environment, plus structured follow-up to ensure full recovery.

testimonials.title: What patients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from people Dr. Shekari has cared for. Names abbreviated for privacy.
testimonials.t1_text: Dr. Shekari treated my kidney stones with a modern laser procedure. Fast recovery, clear explanations, and a very professional team. Highly recommended.
testimonials.t2_text: After years of struggling, the doctor helped us with male infertility evaluation. Honest, caring, and modern approach to a sensitive issue.
testimonials.t3_text: Excellent prostate consultation. The whole process -from booking to follow-up -felt thoughtful and respectful. Best urologist I've seen.

seo.home_title: Dr. Nazir Ahmad Shekari -Urological Surgeon · Endourology & Andrology Specialist in Herat
seo.home_description: Dr. Nazir Ahmad Shekari, Chief of the Urology Department at Jami Hospital, Herat -internationally trained in endourology (Kazakhstan) and member of the European Association of Urology. Modern, minimally-invasive treatment for kidney stones, prostate disease, urinary tract conditions, and male infertility. Book a private consultation in Herat, Afghanistan.

legal.privacy_subtitle: How we collect, store, and protect your data at Dr. Shekari Urology Clinic.
legal.privacy_intro: Your privacy is fundamental to the care we provide. This policy explains what information we collect when you use our website or book an appointment, how we use it, and the rights you have over it.
legal.privacy_section1_body: When you book an appointment we collect your full name, email, phone number, preferred date and time, and any message you choose to share. We do not collect medical history through this website.
legal.privacy_section2_body: We use your data only to confirm and manage your appointment, contact you about your visit, and send appointment reminders. We never sell or share your information with third parties for marketing purposes.
legal.privacy_section3_body: Your data is stored on secure cloud infrastructure with encryption in transit and at rest. Access is restricted to authorised clinic staff only.
legal.privacy_section4_body: You may request access to your data, correction of inaccuracies, or deletion of your record at any time by contacting urology@dr-shekari.com.
legal.privacy_section5_body: We use only essential cookies for authentication and to remember your language preference. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
legal.privacy_section6_body: For any privacy-related question, email urology@dr-shekari.com or call +93 79 604 0915.
legal.terms_subtitle: The rules that govern your use of dr-shekari.com.
legal.terms_intro: By using this website, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
legal.terms_section1_body: This website is for general medical information and appointment booking. It is not a substitute for in-person medical consultation.
legal.terms_section2_body: Appointment requests are confirmed by our staff. We may need to reschedule due to medical emergencies. Please arrive 15 minutes early.
legal.terms_section3_body: Please cancel at least 24 hours in advance so the slot can be offered to another patient. No-shows may affect future bookings.
legal.terms_section4_body: Information on this site is educational. It does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of a qualified physician.
legal.terms_section5_body: We may update these terms from time to time. The latest version will always be on this page.
legal.accessibility_subtitle: Our commitment to making this site usable for everyone.
legal.accessibility_intro: We aim to follow WCAG 2.1 Level AA so that visitors with all abilities can find the information and services they need.
legal.accessibility_section1_body: Keyboard navigation, descriptive alt text, sufficient contrast, screen-reader-friendly markup, and visible focus states across the site.
legal.accessibility_section2_body: Full English, Dari, and Pashto translations with right-to-left layout support for Persian script.
legal.accessibility_section3_body: Found an accessibility problem? Email urology@dr-shekari.com and we'll fix it as quickly as possible.
legal.disclaimer_subtitle: Important information about the medical content on this website.
legal.disclaimer_section1_body: All medical information presented on this website -including articles, FAQs, and service pages -is for general education and awareness. It is not intended to be a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
legal.disclaimer_section2_body: Always seek the advice of Dr. Shekari or another qualified healthcare provider with any questions you have about a medical condition. Never disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of something you have read on this site.
legal.disclaimer_section3_body: If you think you may have a medical emergency, call our 24/7 line at +93 79 604 0915 immediately, or go to the nearest emergency room.
